summary: However, character who leaves his or her Clan

mechanics.name_guess: However, character who leaves his or her Clan
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 033 > npcs > However, character who leaves his or her Clan
mechanics.excerpt: However, character who leaves his or her Clan must return the equipment: Clan character who ends the Life Path outside the service of the Clans purchases equipment per normal rules (see Leaving the Clans below). Path Restrictions: Severe path restrictions apply to Clan characters based on their birth status and caste These restric- tions are described at each stage under the Clan Characters heading: Clan characters who do not follow these restrictions are branded as dark caste (see Leaving the Clans).
